scripts.build: bun run clean && bun run brand:generate && bun run font:sync && bun run docs:generate && bun run build:css && bun run build:js && bun run build:html
scripts.test:e2e: bun run e2e:run && bun run e2e:compose
scripts.e2e:run: sh -c 'set -e; test -f ../out/frontend/site/index.html || { echo "Missing build output: ../out/frontend/site/index.html"; echo "Run: bun run build"; exit 1; }; bunx --bun serve ../out/frontend/site -p 4173 --no-port-switching >/tmp/edgerun-frontend-serve.log 2>&1 & SERVER_PID=$!; trap "kill $SERVER_PID" EXIT; sleep 1; bunx --bun cypress run --config-file cypress.config.ts --browser electron --spec "cypress/e2e/**/*.cy.{js,ts},!cypress/e2e/terminal-compose-stack.cy.js"'
scripts.check: bun run typecheck && bun run lint && bun run style-guide:check
